title: Red Zinger Mini Classic 1989 boys 13 Boulder Mall part 1

transcript.text: It is Sunday, June the 25th, we're up in Boulder, just about a block off the Boulder Mall.
And the boys have gotten their instructions up here.
And we're going to be lining them up and get this race going.
We are right here in front of the Hotel Boulderado, which is a historic hotel.
John's turning, getting ready for that.
There goes Jeff in that yellow helmet we can always find, Jeff.
Right for World Report from Boulder, don't get away.
